name_en: Top-tier replica M82717 Yellow Mini Shell Bag Series New launch Nano Alma Handbag. Recreating the iconic Alma bag in a miniature Nano Alma version. Louis Vuitton's signature Monogram canvas material coordinated with natural leather trim. A meticulously crafted piece combining traditional charm and modern functionality. Opening the double zipper reveals a surprisingly spacious interior design. Utilizing two leather handles and an adjustable detachable shoulder strap, it can be styled in multiple ways. Dimensions: 18 x 12 x 8 cm
